utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully specified with detailed data: property includes address, type, price, size, features, and status; financing includes loan amount, down payment, interest rate, amortization, payment, and closing costs; legal_services has law firm, fees, and total cost; moving_services details company, base cost, storage, handling, and total; setup_services lists multiple utility setup fees; total_budget provides a full cost breakdown. All items are complete and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property at 170 Bayview Ave, a modern 1-bedroom + den condo priced at CAD $472,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, this most closely matches the 'New Build' option (price CAD $480K, eco-friendly, modern, within budget, rated 10). The financing package chosen is 'Mortgage_001 (First-time buyer 90% LTV)', which aligns directly with the ground-truth 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage (rating 10). The legal services cost CAD $1600 and are handled by a local firm; this matches the 'International Legal' package rating of 2 due to cost and scope mismatch, though likely intended as a general legal service. The moving company 'Toronto Urban Movers Co.' offers padded fragile item handling and costs CAD $1550, which fits the 'Premium Moving' category (rating 7). The setup services total CAD $425 including hydro and internet, comparable to the 'Premium Utilities' package (rating 9) for comprehensive coverage. Thus, we map each selected element to its most appropriate ground-truth rating.
